name: Sim-City Indoor Golf
about: Sim-City Indoor Golf operates as a full-service indoor golf complex with locations in Westbrook, Bangor, and Old Orchard Beach, Maine. Established in 2018, the facility utilizes Trackman iO simulators to provide a realistic golfing experience year-round. The venues feature on-site food and beverages through a partnership with Birdies Grill & Tavern, creating an all-in-one destination for practice, leagues, and casual play. Sim City offers flexible booking for hourly sessions and organizes competitive leagues across its three locations, with a unified leaderboard system managed through the Trackman Golf App.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to professional-grade Trackman iO technology for accurate swing and ball data
Unified league play across multiple locations with automated scoring and leaderboards
Full-service environment with food, drinks, and social amenities integrated with the golf experience
Flexible hourly booking with options for private lessons, club fitting, and event hosting

food_and_drink.notes: On-site food service provided through partnership with Birdies Grill & Tavern
On-site beverage service provided through partnership with Birdies Grill & Tavern

simulator_hardware.notes: Advanced dual-mode radar and optical tracking system used across all locations

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: It is recommended to bring your own clubs, but rental sets are available with limited availability. Clubs must be cleaned of excessive mud and debris before use for accurate tracking.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drinks into the simulator bays?
faq.answer: No, all food and drinks must be kept outside the simulator bays. On-site food and beverages are available through the partnership with Birdies Grill & Tavern.

faq.question: How much time is needed for 18 holes?
faq.answer: For 18 holes, the time required is approximately 2 hours for 2 golfers or 4 hours for 4 golfers. The final 5 minutes of reservations are reserved for clean-up and checkout.

faq.question: Is Sim City kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sim City offers junior divisions in their leagues and provides a welcoming atmosphere for golfers of all skill levels, including beginners and youth players.
